summary: Iteration 143 - P0 System Audit COMPLETED. All critical fixes verified working: 1) should_apply_watermark() fix verified in code - now receives dict with 'plan' key. 2) Credits balance API returns both 'balance' and 'credits' fields correctly. 3) GIF Maker wizard flow tested end-to-end (Upload→Reaction→Style→Create). 4) All navigation pages load without blank pages. 5) Credits display correctly across all pages (398 credits shown).
